summary: Full E2E test of Doo app. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases passed (GET /api/contexts returns 6, GET /api/challenge for all contexts incl. exclude param, POST/GET /api/answers persist and exclude _id, 404 on unknown context). Frontend (mobile 390x844): Home renders Doo brand + 6 colored context buttons, all tappable; shield icon opens 'Protection anti-scroll' modal with all 7 limit chips (5/10/15/20/30/45/60); selecting chips updates the 'Activer (X min)' button label correctly (verified 30 -> 15). Navigation Home -> Challenge displays context pill + challenge text + 'Commencer le défi !'. Challenge -> Answer shows yellow card with input placeholder, 'Valider ma réponse' saves to backend and shows 'Bravo !' success card. 'Retour au défi' link is visible on the Answer screen. No red screen / runtime errors. Only benign console warnings (expo-notifications web limitation expected per request; deprecated shadow*/pointerEvents style props from RN-Web).

minor.issue: Unknown context is silently accepted (label falls back to raw key). Not blocking; current spec acceptable, but consider 404 for unknown context for consistency with GET /api/challenge.

issues: Console warns 'shadow*' style props are deprecated on web — replace shadow* props with boxShadow in StyleSheet (purely a deprecation warning, not visual).
Console warns props.pointerEvents is deprecated (RN-Web). Likely from a library; consider migrating to style.pointerEvents.

react_native_issues.issue: Listening to push token changes not fully supported on web; expected per request. Local scheduled notifications won't fire on web/Expo Go — only the modal UI was validated. No code change needed for this scope.

action_items: (Optional) Replace 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' to silence the RN-Web deprecation warning.
(Optional) Consider returning 404 from POST /api/answers when context is unknown, to match GET /api/challenge behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] and os.environ['DB_NAME'] correctly (fail-fast). Good.
AnswerRecord.created_at is stored as ISO string; GET /api/answers sorts by created_at desc — works lexicographically for ISO-UTC, OK.
Frontend api/client.ts properly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix.

All interactive elements have testID coverage (context-button-*, open-guard-button, guard-modal, limit-chip-*, enable-guard-button, start-challenge-button, answer-input, validate-answer-button, back-to-challenge-link, back-home-button).
seed_data_creation: Inserted ~3 TEST_-prefixed answer records in MongoDB via POST /api/answers during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_doo_api.py are idempotent; run with pytest. Frontend uses RN-Web via Expo; use mobile viewport 390x844. After navigating between Expo Router screens, the previous screen may remain in the DOM (multiple matching testIDs across stack) — use .first or specific waits. Push notifications cannot be exercised on web.
